name: heroku
description: Portable Heroku skills packaged as a Codex source plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Heroku runtime, data, and platform guidance
interface.longDescription: Portable Heroku skills packaged for Codex. Includes deployment, app operations, config vars, Key-Value Store, domains and TLS, logging and drains, add-ons, Postgres, pipelines, Managed Inference, AppLink, Heroku Connect, and Slack agent deployment workflows while keeping the source repo agent-neutral.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repo for Heroku deployment readiness
Help me set up Heroku domains and TLS safely
Review my Heroku Redis and logging workflow
Help me deploy a Slack Bolt app to Heroku safely
